B_value: a process-based mechanistic model simulating nutrient cycling, food web dynamics, water quality, ecosystem service provisioning in freshwater lakes, including vertical stratification.; constants for biogeochemistry, food web, sediment processes; daily mixing depth, temperature profile from flake
AB_value: a fully integrated aquatic ecosystem model coupling the general lake model glm with the pclake+ ecological model via the fabm interface. this framework simulates interactions between hydrodynamics e.g., stratification, temperature , ecological processes e.g., phytoplankton, nutrients, macrophytes . enables simulation of ecosystem responses to climate change, restoration actions.
